title: arum cylindraceum subsp. cylindraceum
intro: Arum cylindraceum subsp. cylindraceum, also known as the cylindrical arum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Araceae. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of the cylindrical arum include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of the cylindrical arum typically involve the leaves and roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal purposes.
